Title: Add payment link and invoice status lifecycle endpoints
Description: Add invoice payment_link support and enforce invoice states (unpaid, paid, void, overdue) through protected API endpoints.
Acceptance Criteria: Payment link field persists and validates format; Status transitions enforced server-side; Org scoping enforced; API tests cover valid/invalid transitions

Title: Implement auto-invoice-on-completion service
Description: Create deterministic service that generates one invoice per eligible completed job and prevents duplicates.
Acceptance Criteria: Completion creates invoice exactly once for eligible jobs; Repeated completion calls do not duplicate invoices; Invoice links back to job and organization; Integration tests cover idempotency

Title: Add collection escalation scheduler logic (day 0, 3, 7, 14)
Description: Implement reminder escalation stages for unpaid invoices on deterministic day thresholds.
Acceptance Criteria: Escalation runs are idempotent; Day thresholds match spec; Existing stage is not duplicated; Org scoping enforced for all reminders

Title: Implement payment event handling and reminder suppression
Description: When invoice is paid, suppress active collection reminders; when reopened, reactivate correct reminder stage.
Acceptance Criteria: Paid transition dismisses active collection reminders; Reopened invoice reactivates reminder path; No cross-org side effects; Integration tests cover paid/reopen flows

Title: Build unpaid and overdue dashboard cards with aging buckets
Description: Add owner/operator dashboard visibility for unpaid totals, overdue counts, and aging buckets.
Acceptance Criteria: Cards are org-scoped; Aging bucket math matches backend; Empty state is clear; Mobile layout remains usable

Title: Add payment-link UX on invoice detail and collection workflow
Description: Expose payment link controls in invoice detail and present copy/share actions for collections follow-up.
Acceptance Criteria: User can set/update payment link; Link rendered clearly for copy/share; Validation errors shown; Works on mobile viewport

Title: Add collections smoke script for completion-to-payment path
Description: Create deterministic smoke script validating complete -> invoice -> escalation -> paid suppression path.
Acceptance Criteria: Smoke script exits non-zero on failure; Outputs each stage with status; Works in local and CI environments

Title: Add focused CI gate for billing automation path
Description: Add targeted CI step to run billing automation integration tests before full suite.
Acceptance Criteria: CI executes targeted billing tests as separate step; Failures stop pipeline early; Workflow file remains valid
